name: Monitor Meta CAPI event match quality (EMQ) across every pixel

parameters.content:
## Meta CAPI Event Match Quality (EMQ) Monitor

Watches your Meta pixels for match-quality decay. Every CAPI template only SENDS events; this one MONITORS how well they match, so you catch a silent signal-quality drop before it wrecks optimization and costs.

### How it works
- Discovers the ad account's pixels and keeps the recently-active ones.
- Pulls each pixel's server-event match stats (PII coverage per event) from the Graph API.
- Scores match quality 0-100, weighting the conversion events you optimize on three times heavier.
- Flags any pixel below your alert threshold and has Claude explain the gap and the exact fix (hashed email/phone, fbc/fbp, Advanced Matching).

### Setup
1. Add to your .env: META_ACCESS_TOKEN, META_AD_ACCOUNT_ID, META_API_VERSION, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
2. Run the manual trigger, or attach a Schedule trigger for daily monitoring.

### Customization
Set CONVERSION_EVENTS and ALERT_BELOW in Config. To track decay over time, add a node that appends the daily scores to Google Sheets or a database and diff against the prior run. Swap stdout for Slack or email to auto-alert.

Built by **nocode.expert** - done-for-you automation & tracking. https://nocode.expert

## 1. Read match stats
Discover pixels and pull per-event PII coverage from the Graph API.

## 2. Score & explain
Score match quality, then Claude explains gaps and fixes.

## 3. Report
Report the EMQ scorecard and alerts (swap for Slack/email).
